case_title: MANNING SCOTT VS CHEVRON CORP A CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MANNING SCOTT AS TO DEFENDANT CHEVRON CORP A CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-20-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHEVRON CORP A CORPORATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANNING SCOTT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEVRON CORP A CORPORATION $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $59.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,059.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT TO DEF.RETURNED TO US.RETURN TO SENDER.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT TO PLTF.RETURNED TO U S.NO FORWARDING ADDRESS.
WRIT OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO S.F. #5402W101 $3.50
ON TODAYS DATE, THE PLTF.SCOTT MANNING ASKED TO LOOK AT A FILE. HE THEN REMOVED THE DEFENDANT'S COPY OF THE RETURNED JUDGMENT AND ENVELOPE.
THIS ENTRY WAS PLACED IN THE REGISTER OF ACTION IMMEDIATELY AFTER HE RETURNED THE FILE TO THIS OFFICE.
